name: Yogurt, Granola and Carrot Jam
steps: Vac the ingredients together at 100% then leave in the fridge for 4 days until the sugar has dissolved.
Once sugar has dissolved pass and store the syrup.
Vac the ingredients together at 100% then leave in the fridge for 4 days until the sugar has dissolved.
Mix all the ingredients together in a large bowl.
Spread out on a tray and over bake at 150C.
Allow to cool and store in airtight container.
